settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Orders are generally dispatched within 1–3 business days. Delivery timing depends on your location and is shown at checkout when available.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: Eligible unused items can be returned within the stated return window. Please keep original tags and packaging intact.

settings.question: How do I choose the right size?
settings.answer: Measure your pet's neck, widest chest point and back length. Compare those measurements with the product size guide and size up when between sizes.

settings.question: Can I change or cancel my order?
settings.answer: Contact us as soon as possible. We will do our best to help before the order enters packing or dispatch.

settings.question: How should I care for apparel and beds?
settings.answer: Always follow the product care label. Gentle cold washing and air drying are recommended for many soft goods.
